title: 354pcs 25mm Wet Dry Sanding Discs Drums for Dremel Sanding Bits 60-10000 Grit Sandpaper Compatible with Dremel Rotary Tools, Micromesh Pads Polishing Kit for Resin Wood Jewelry Metal
features: Wet & Dry Sanding Discs: The 1 inch sanding discs work for both wet and dry applications, with water extending disc life while reducing dust. The hook and loop foam backing minimizes vibration for smoother sanding and polishing control across all surfaces

Professional Polishing System: Color-coded sponge pads provide three polishing levels: yellow/green for heavy cutting, blue for medium polishing, and red/orange for fine finishing. Complete your project with the included wool pad to achieve a flawless mirror polish on any material

Complete Sanding & Polishing Kit: This all-in-one kit takes you from rough sanding with aluminum drums to wet sanding for smooth surfaces, finishing with specialized polishing pads. The 1/8" shank fits most rotary tools for versatile use on metals, wood, resin and more

Wide Material Compatibility: Engineered for precision performance with a maximum speed of 10,000 RPM, while recommended operating speed below 5,000 RPM ensures optimal control and perfect results on car, metal, wood, resin, glass and opals. Ideal for detailed work requiring finesse

Organized Storage Solution: Package includes 320 pieces of 25mm wet dry sandpaper grit 60 to 10000 each 20 pieces, 5 x different hardness polishing pads, 1 x wool pad, 1 x hand sanding block, 1 x drill sanding pad, 2 x foam sponge pads, 2 x 1/8" metal shank, 10 x 80 grit sanding sleeves, 10 x 120 grit sanding sleeves, 2 x polishing sanding heads，total 354 pcs—all items are neatly stored in a plastic box with instructions for easy access
